name: Onion Chutney (Piaz Ka Chatni)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and cut them into slices about 1/4 inch thick.
2. Peel the garlic and chop it very finely.
3. Remove the outer skin from the ginger and cut the flesh into thin strips.
4. Mix the ginger, onions, and garlic together in a bowl.
5. Add the juice of one lemon to the mixture and stir.
6. Sprinkle salt, chili powder, and black pepper over the mixture.
7. Chill for 1 hour before serving.
